title: SLSS BOM 2024 25 Strategic Initiatives
body:
JULY 2024




            OUR STRATEGIC
            INITIATIVES
            SEASON 2024/25 – OPERATIONAL

STRATEGIC
INTIATIVES
 1. WHY – OUR MISSION & STRATEGIC INITIATIVES


THE SURF LIFE SAVING MISSION
• SAVE LIVES
• CREATE GREAT AUSTRALIANS
• BUILD BETTER COMMUNITIES


HOW WE CONTRIBUTE TO THE MISSION


         WE SUPPORT                WE DEVELOP



          WE ENGAGE                WE INNOVATE

 2. OUR STRATEGIC INITIATIVES
- LIFESAVING & SUPPORT OPERATIONS

1. GROWTH & DEVELOPMENT OF SUPPORT OPERATIONS
• Engage more members to participate in Support Operations roles while continuing
  to improve our operational capabilities and existing Support Operations members.

2. DEVELOP & SUPPORT OUR PATROLLING MEMBERS
• Supporting our clubs and members by undertaking regular ‘health checks’, while
  increasing engagement, implementing support mechanisms for clubs.

3. IDEATE & INNOVATE FOR THE NEXT GENERATION
• Engaging the next generation of SLS Leaders, providing Development Camps and
  Workshops encouraging the development of leadership skills, and out-of-the-box
  thinking.
 2. OUR STRATEGIC INITIATIVES
- EDUCATION

1. INCREASED TRAINING OFFICERS & ASSESSORS
• Developing and engaging more members to take on the roles of Trainers and
  Assessors to enable Clubs to upskill and develop their members.

2. INCREASED PARTICIPATION IN SILVER MEDALLION PATROL CAPTAIN
COURSES
• Developing the skills of our Patrol Captains and Future SLS Leaders, while
  providing a means of engagement.

3. PROVIDING TRAINER & ASSESSOR SUPPORT TO THE ILLAWARRA
BRANCH
• Supporting our neighbours by sharing our knowledge, skills and resources.
 2. OUR STRATEGIC INITIATIVES
– SURF SPORTS

1. YOUTH DEVELOPMENT PATHWAY CAMP (INTERBRANCH)
• Youth Development Clinics to further enhance the skills of Youth Members and
  provide them support in the Elite Athlete pathways.

2. ADAPTIVE DEVELOPMENT CLINICS
• Providing a pathway for the further development of the Adaptive Athletes.

3. SYDNEY BRANCH POOL RESCUE CHAMPIONSHIPS
• Organise a Pool Rescue Championship event to encourage further engagement in
  this event at a local level.

4. SYDNEY BRANCH SURFBOARD RIDING SERIES AND CHAMPIONSHIPS
• Delivering an innovative Surfboard riding series to promote Board Riding within the
  Branch.
 2. OUR STRATEGIC INITIATIVES
– YOUTH & JUNIOR

1. INTERBRANCH YOUTH CAMP AT ILLAWARRA BRANCH
• Engaging our Youth whilst simultaneously supporting our neighbouring Illawarra
  Branch.

2. GARIE SLSC YOUTH SUPPORT CAMP
• Engaging our Youth whilst simultaneously supporting Garie SLSC

3. END OF SEASON YOUTH FUNCTION
• Providing an opportunity for Youth members to interact, socialise and share ideas.

4. YOUTH DRAGON BOAT RACING TEAM
• Develop the skills, fitness, leadership and team building abilities of our Youth
  members.
 2. OUR STRATEGIC INITIATIVES
– MEMBER SERVICES

1. MEMBERS SERVICES CLUB OFFICERS SUPPORT RESOURCE
• Create an overarching support resource for club Members Services officers.
2. MEMBER LEADERSHIP SKILLS DEVELOPMENT DAY (18-25S)
• Undertake a Member Leadership Skills Development Day focussing on enhancing
  growth for our 18-25yo members
3. UPSKILL CLUB MPIOS
• Upskill our club MPIOs by running 2 Training courses
4. MENTAL HEALTH FIRST AID COURSES
• Run Mental Health First Aid Courses for our clubs
5. MEMBER FOCUSSED ENGAGEMENT REPORT
• Produce a report for clubs to discuss member focussed engagement, following on
  from a club Development Day
6. DIVERSITY & INCLUSION COLLABORATION & SUPPORT RESOURCES
• Diversity and Inclusion collaboration and support resources for our clubs
 3. WHAT – THE ACTIVITIES


MEASURE

• How can the activities assist in measuring the progress or standing of the initiative?

IMPACT

• What are the Benefits to Clubs, Members and the Community?

TIMELINES & ACHIEVABILITY

• Is the initiative achievable in the desired timeframe?

FUNDING & RESOURCES

• As discussed in Budget Meetings.

PARTNERSHIPS/SPONSOR ALIGNMENT

• Would there be a key sponsor or partner that can assist in this area?
